label: Strategy Builder
description: Futures calendar spreads and multi-leg options combo builder with payoff diagram preview.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file.

0.5.note: Widget file has no lib/mocks/ imports; delegates to FuturesSpreadsTab and OptionsCombosPanel which import from mocks internally.

0.6.note: options-data-context has no isLoading field; data is synchronous mock.

0.7.note: When !isCrypto and strategiesMode==='futures-spreads', Futures Spreads button disabled and OptionsCombosPanel renders. FuturesSpreadsTab renders full matrix always. OptionsCombosPanel always renders combo selectors.

0.8.note: Context throws if Provider missing (WidgetErrorBoundary); no async error path.

0.9.note: No dead code or commented-out blocks in widget file.

l0.notes: 0.6/0.8 N/A — synchronous mock data, no async paths.

1.1.note: Widget reads strategiesMode, setStrategiesMode, isCrypto, asset, setSelectedInstrument, setSelectedFuture via useOptionsData() exclusively. Panel sub-components re-derive their own data from mocks — panel-layer behavior; widget file is clean.

1.3.note: Org filter scopes watchlists; strategies asset is user-selected and not org-filtered.

1.4.note: clientIds not applicable — strategy builder is asset-scoped.

1.5.note: Strategy filter not applicable — builder lets user construct new strategies.

1.6.note: Empty organizationIds returns full watchlist scope.

1.7.note: COMBO_TYPES, CALENDAR_EXPIRIES, generateSpreadMatrix in lib/mocks/fixtures — panel-level, widget file clean.

l1.notes: FuturesSpreadsTab and OptionsCombosPanel re-derive data from mocks — tracked in knownIssues.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real-time spread/combo construction), paper ✓ (strategy selection routes to paper), batch — strategy construction read-only in batch mode.

3.2.note: Context reads mode from useExecutionMode() at context line 129.

3.5.note: Paper mode: strategy selection and combo construction routes to paper order entry via options-trade-panel.

l3.notes: 3.3/3.4 require human verification (strategy submission disabled in batch, batch indicator visible).

4.1.note: Tab toggle buttons (Futures Spreads / Options Combos) have valid onClick handlers calling setStrategiesMode. No dead handlers.

l4.notes: 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 require human walkthrough (mode toggle, spread selection, combo leg addition, submit to trade panel).

5.1.note: Target strategies: vertical-spread, iron-condor, options-combo (options-combos mode), futures-calendar-spread (futures-spreads mode). Widget drives options-trade-panel via setSelectedInstrument.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors in widget file.

7.2.note: No mock data imports in widget file.

7.3.note: Widget file is 50 lines; well within 500-line limit.

7.4.note: OptionsStrategiesWidget PascalCase; file kebab-case; onPick camelCase.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No security anti-patterns in widget file.

7.7.note: onPick useCallback has stable deps [setSelectedFuture, setSelectedInstrument]. No inline objects in deps.

l7.notes: All L7 clean. bg-muted/30 uses valid theme token.

8.1.note: No text-[...] or fontSize= in widget file; h-7/text-xs are scale tokens.

8.2.note: No arbitrary spacing tokens; p-1, space-y-3, gap-0.5, p-0.5, px-3 are all Tailwind scale.

8.3.note: Uses Button from components/ui/button; delegates content to FuturesSpreadsTab/OptionsCombosPanel.

8.4.note: Agent grep: no bare div onClick, no img without alt in widget file. Buttons have role implied by <Button> primitive. Human keyboard pass for tab toggle required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Strategy builder is large and complex; trade panel is a compact form — different sizes, layout roles.

relationships.notes: Drives options-trade-panel via setSelectedInstrument for combo instruments. Also clears setSelectedFuture on combo pick to avoid ambiguity with futures-trade-panel.

dataContract.notes: Spread matrix and combo data currently from synchronous mock. Production: futures calendar spread data from Deribit WebSocket; combo leg pricing from options chain WebSocket stream.

gaps: Futures Spreads tab disabled for TradFi (isCrypto guard)
coverage.notes: Futures Spreads tab crypto-only; Options Combos tab works for both crypto and TradFi.

knownIssues: FuturesSpreadsTab and OptionsCombosPanel import spread matrix generators and combo types directly from lib/mocks/fixtures — should be injected via context props in a future refactor.
COMBO_TYPES and CALENDAR_EXPIRIES config constants live in lib/mocks/fixtures — should move to lib/config/services/options.config.ts.

findings.description: COMBO_TYPES, CALENDAR_EXPIRIES, generateSpreadMatrix, SPREAD_EXPIRIES used by panel sub-components live in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock rather than lib/config/. Open for future config extraction.
options-strategies-widget.tsx:31,39 — 'Futures Spreads' and 'Options Combos' button labels not i18n-wrapped
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
